info.name: Hospital Management System — Corrected Audit
info.description: Complete test suite for the HMS Backend API. Run folders 01–10 top-to-bottom. base_url = http://localhost:5000/api/v1. JWT and all auto-increment IDs are captured automatically.

request.description: NationalID max 16 chars. Gender must be 'M' or 'F'. Salary >= 0.
LicenseNumber max 15 characters. EmployeeID must already exist in Employees.
XOR rule: EmployeeID is set, PatientID must be NULL (handled server-side).

exec: console.log('JWT token saved to collection variable: token');
console.error('Login failed or token missing:', JSON.stringify(json));

request.description: Logs in and automatically saves the JWT to the `token` collection variable.

exec: console.error('Create Patient failed or PatientID missing:', JSON.stringify(json));

request.description: PatientID is AUTO_INCREMENT. Captured into current_patient_id by the test script.
XOR rule: PatientID is set, EmployeeID must be NULL (handled server-side).
EmployeeID must reference a Doctor (Doctors table). Uses dynamic current_patient_id.
Doctors have DELETE permission on Appointments per the SQL GRANT statements.

exec: } else { console.error('Create Medical Record failed:', JSON.stringify(json)); }

body.raw:
{
  "PatientID": {{current_patient_id}},
  "EmployeeID": "E001",
  "RecordDate": "2025-06-20",
  "ClinicalNotes": "Patient presents with palpitations and shortness of breath.",
  "FinalDiagnosis": "Cardiac Arrhythmia"
}

exec: } else { console.error('Request Lab Test failed:', JSON.stringify(json)); }

item.name: 08-D Get Lab Report by Test ID

variable.description: Replace with actual UserID from Get All User Accounts.
